macosPackagedSmokePrereq0: On macOS: npm run build && npm run pack:mac:dir, then npm run verify:mac-unpacked (bundled engines in bin/ may be filled before release).
macosPackagedSmokePrereq1: App bundle under dist/mac-arm64/, dist/mac/, or dist/mac-x64/ — Velorix.app with Contents/Resources/bin/.
macosPackagedSmokePrereq2: Clean userData profile (first launch) or intentional test over an existing profile.
macosPackagedSmokeStep_launch: Open Velorix.app (Contents/MacOS/Velorix), not npm run dev.
macosPackagedSmokeStep_engines: Status bar: yt-dlp / ffmpeg / ffprobe versions with no “not found” errors.
macosPackagedSmokeStep_open_file: Editor: open a local MP4/MKV; preview plays and scrub works.
macosPackagedSmokeStep_ytdlp: Downloads: short URL (10–30 s), queue reaches Done, log has no ERROR.
macosPackagedSmokeStep_editor_from_dl: From queue/history: Open in editor for a finished file.
macosPackagedSmokeStep_export: MP4 segment export (libx264) completes without error.
macosPackagedSmokeStep_video_sprite: §7.5: FFmpeg rail → preview sprite sheet (PNG/JPEG); grid file saves; see ownerManualSmoke Video sprite.
macosPackagedSmokeStep_knowledge: Knowledge base: open an article; internal .md link works.
macosPackagedSmokeStep_support_zip: About → Support ZIP: archive is created; no secrets in the text.
macosPackagedSmokeStep_settings: Settings → Dependencies: engine paths point at Contents/Resources/bin.
macosPackagedSmokePass0: No crash when quitting the app and reopening the bundle.
macosPackagedSmokePass1: Download progress column shows labels during post-processing merge/embed.
macosPackagedSmokePass2: userData/logs have no tokens/passwords; dist/ artifacts have no .env.
macosPackagedSmokeOwnerLine: manual macOS packaged smoke (Velorix.app), not automated in CI UI
